behavior_summary: Orchestrates an ambush/U8P_ENDLITH::hatch sequence when an ENDLITH item triggers its U8P_ENDLITH::hatch event: plays music and SFX, shakes the camera, spawns multiple visual/effect helper processes, temporarily freezes the Avatar, creates enemy NPCs at/near the item's coordinates, sets those NPCs into combat targeting the Avatar, marks/removes the original item, and emits a creature bark line.

Sequence is driven by many asynchronous spawned helper scripts (FREE::*, LITHOS::*, ERTHSPEL::*, METHOD::*) responsible for timed visuals and creature behaviors; the main script sequences and coordinates them.
The Avatar is placed into stasis (setAvatarInStasis(1)) early in the sequence and restored (setAvatarInStasis(0)) after the dramatic effects conclude, ensuring the player cannot act during the event.
notable_control_flow: Start: playMusic and setAvatarInStasis(1) to begin the cinematic/ambush state (U8P_ENDLITH::ENDLITH::hatch).
Query the triggering item for map and coordinates (Item::getZ/Y/X, Npc::getMap) and spawn multiple helper processes that use those coordinates to render effects (spawn FREE::*, LITHOS::*).
Camera shake and SFX are triggered concurrently (Camera::startQuake, playSFX); the quake is later stopped (Camera::stopQuake) and followed by a finishing spawn (ERTHSPEL::11F0).

Area iteration: the script scans/iterates around the item location and, for each suitable position, creates NPCs (Npc::create), marks the original item (Item::orStatus), removes or pops the item (Item::pop), spawns per-NPC helper METHOD::15E7, and configures the NPCs for combat (Npc::setInCombat, Npc::setTarget).
The item emits a bark line (Item::bark) during the sequence to convey story/dialogue.
Many operations are implemented as separate spawned processes (suspend/async); the main process initiates them and returns/resumes depending on spawn semantics.
open_questions: Exact trigger semantics: whether this runs only on Event 7 ('U8P_ENDLITH::hatch') or also on entering a fast-area trigger — inferred as Event 7 but the mapping to area entry is not explicit.
Precise behavior, timing, and visual details of the spawned helper scripts (FREE::1C6D, FREE::29D8, LITHOS::09B2, etc.) — these are invoked but their internals are external to this script.
Which exact NPC types and how many are created for each spawn point — the script calls Npc::create with type ids but the concrete type values and counts are not shown in the disassembly summary.
Exact conditions used during the area iteration (shape filters, range limits) — the iteration mechanism and filters are inferred but not fully specified in the summary.
Whether the original item is always removed/populated (Item::pop) or only in specific cases (e.g., on successful spawn) — disassembly implies pop but branching details are not explicit.

main_function.name: U8P_ENDLITH::hatch
main_function.purpose: Coordinate a dramatic U8P_ENDLITH::hatch/ambush cinematic: freeze the player, play music/SFX, shake the camera, spawn visual and creature processes, create enemy NPCs around the U8P_ENDLITH::hatch location, set them into combat targeting the Avatar, mark/remove the original item, and present a dialog/bark line.
entry_conditions: Invoked on Event 7 (U8P_ENDLITH::hatch) for the ENDLITH object.
Appears to be triggered by the item's U8P_ENDLITH::hatch/activation (possibly tied to an area trigger); called with the triggering item pointer at BP+06h.

function_map.name: U8P_ENDLITH::hatch
function_map.role: Main event handler that sequences the U8P_ENDLITH::hatch/ambush cinematic and spawns helpers and NPCs.

function_map.name: METHOD::091C
function_map.role: Spawned helper (timing/visual controller) invoked early with map/item refs; coordinates an effect tied to the U8P_ENDLITH::hatch.

function_map.name: METHOD::15E7
function_map.role: Per-NPC spawned helper to initialize or control NPC behavior immediately after creation.

function_map.name: LITHOS::09B2
function_map.role: Creature-specific behavior/visual script spawned during the sequence.

function_map.name: LITHOS::0D3C
function_map.role: Creature-specific behavior/visual script spawned during the sequence.

function_map.name: LITHOS::0DDC
function_map.role: Creature-specific behavior/visual script spawned during the sequence.

function_map.name: LITHOS::0A14
function_map.role: Creature-specific behavior/visual script spawned during the sequence.

function_map.name: FREE::1C6D
function_map.role: Generic visual/timing helper spawned with map/coordinate args.

function_map.name: FREE::29D8
function_map.role: Generic visual/timing helper spawned with map/coordinate args.

function_map.name: FREE::1C8B
function_map.role: Generic visual/timing helper spawned with map/coordinate args.

function_map.name: ERTHSPEL::11F0
function_map.role: Spawned at sequence end to produce earth/spell visual effects.

external_calls.purpose: Start background music for the U8P_ENDLITH::hatch/ambush cinematic.
Disable Avatar input/actions at sequence start (called with 1) and re-enable at end (called with 0).
Obtain the map context for spawning map-tied effects and helpers.
Query the triggering item's Z (layer/height) coordinate for effect/NPC placement.
Query the triggering item's Y coordinate for effect/NPC placement.
Query the triggering item's X coordinate for effect/NPC placement.
Launch multiple helper processes (FREE::*, LITHOS::*, METHOD::*) to run visuals/timed behavior tied to the U8P_ENDLITH::hatch.
Begin camera shake effect to dramatize the U8P_ENDLITH::hatch.
Play short SFX cues during the quake/sequence for audio feedback.
Emit the enemy/boss dialogue line from the triggering item/NPC during the sequence.
End the camera shake after the dramatic portion of the sequence.
Spawn a finishing earth/spell visual effect after quake ends.
Create enemy NPC instances at/near the item's coordinates as part of the ambush.
Set status bits on the triggering item (mark it used/active to prevent re-triggering or denote state change).
Remove/pop the original item from the map visually and in world state at specified coordinates.
Mark newly created NPCs as in combat so they will act immediately.
Set the created NPCs' combat target to the Avatar to initiate aggression.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Orchestrates an ambush/U8P_ENDLITH::hatch sequence when an ENDLITH item triggers its U8P_ENDLITH::hatch event: plays music and SFX, shakes the camera, spawns multiple visual/effect helper processes, temporarily freezes the Avatar, creates enemy NPCs at/near the item's coordinates, sets those NPCs into combat targeting the Avatar, marks/removes the original item, and emits a creature bark line.
